member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.HcsNative
member.summary: Interop z Host Compute System (HCS).

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative
member.summary: Native interop for virtdisk.dll - Windows Virtual Disk API Used for direct VHD/VHDX manipulation without WMI overhead
Creates a virtual hard disk (VHD) image file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.OpenVirtualDisk(HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VIRTUAL_STORAGE_TYPE@,System.String,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VIRTUAL_DISK_ACCESS_MASK,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.OPEN_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.OPEN_VIRTUAL_DISK_PARAMETERS@,System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Opens a virtual hard disk (VHD) for use.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.AttachVirtualDisk(System.IntPtr,System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.ATTACH_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG,System.UInt32,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.ATTACH_VIRTUAL_DISK_PARAMETERS@,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Attaches a virtual hard disk (VHD) by locating an appropriate VHD provider to accomplish the attachment.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.DetachVirtualDisk(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.DETACH_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Detaches a virtual hard disk (VHD) by locating an appropriate VHD provider to accomplish the detachment.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.ResizeVirtualDisk(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.RESIZE_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.RESIZE_VIRTUAL_DISK_PARAMETERS@,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Resizes a virtual hard disk (VHD).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.GetVirtualDiskInformation(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32@,System.IntPtr,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Retrieves information about a VHD.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.CloseHandle(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Closes a handle to a virtual disk.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.GetLastError
member.summary: Gets the last Win32 error code.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.SetVirtualDiskInformation(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.SET_VIRTUAL_DISK_INFO@)
member.summary: Sets information for a virtual disk.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.GetVirtualDiskPhysicalPath(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32@,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Gets the physical path of an attached virtual disk.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.MergeVirtualDisk(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.MERGE_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.MERGE_VIRTUAL_DISK_PARAMETERS@,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Merges a child virtual hard disk in a differencing chain with parent disks in the chain.
Creates a differencing virtual hard disk file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.CompactVirtualDisk(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.COMPACT_VIRTUAL_DISK_FLAG,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.COMPACT_VIRTUAL_DISK_PARAMETERS@,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Compacts a virtual hard disk file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.BreakMirrorVirtualDisk(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Breaks a parent-child relationship between VHD files.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.ApplySnapshotVhdSet(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.APPLY_SNAPSHOT_VHDSET_PARAMETERS@,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.APPLY_SNAPSHOT_VHDSET_FLAG)
member.summary: Applies a snapshot to a VHD Set file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.VirtDiskNative.DeleteSnapshotVhdSet(System.IntPtr,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.DELETE_SNAPSHOT_VHDSET_PARAMETERS@,HyperV.Core.Hcs.Interop.DELETE_SNAPSHOT_VHDSET_FLAG)
member.summary: Deletes a snapshot from a VHD Set file.

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.BasicStorageService
member.summary: Basic HCS-based storage service implementation using virtdisk.dll Provides direct VHD/VHDX manipulation without WMI overhead This is a legacy implementation kept for reference - use EnhancedStorageService instead

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.BasicStorageService.CreateVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVhdRequest)
member.summary: Creates a virtual hard disk using the Windows Virtual Disk API (virtdisk.dll) This approach bypasses WMI and provides direct access to the underlying Windows API

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.BasicStorageService.AttachVirtualHardDisk(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Attaches a VHD/VHDX file to the system using virtdisk.dll Note: This attaches the VHD as a disk to the host system, not to a specific VM For VM attachment, use the WMI-based StorageService instead

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.BasicStorageService.DetachVirtualHardDisk(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detaches a VHD/VHDX file from the system using virtdisk.dll Note: This detaches the VHD from the host system, not from a specific VM For VM detachment, use the WMI-based StorageService instead

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.BasicStorageService.ResizeVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.ResizeVhdRequest)
member.summary: Resizes a VHD/VHDX file using virtdisk.dll This provides direct access to the Windows Virtual Disk API for resizing operations

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.BasicStorageService.GetStorageTypeFromPath(System.String)
member.summary: Determines the storage type based on the file path extension
member.returns: VIRTUAL_STORAGE_TYPE structure for the file format

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService
member.summary: Container Service using Host Compute System (HCS) API for lightweight containers.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.Create(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest)
member.summary: Creates a container using HCS API with container-specific configuration.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.CreateContainerConfiguration(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest,System.String)
member.summary: Creates HCS container configuration optimized for containers.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.StartContainer(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Starts a container using HCS API.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.IsContainerPresent(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if an HCS container exists by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.ListContainers
member.summary: Lists all HCS containers.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.StartContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Starts an HCS container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.StopContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Stops an HCS container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.TerminateContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Terminates an HCS container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.PauseContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Pauses an HCS container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.ResumeContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Resumes an HCS container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.GetContainerProperties(System.String)
member.summary: Gets properties of an HCS container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.ContainerService.ModifyContainer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies an HCS container by name.

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService
member.summary: Enhanced HCS-based storage service with advanced features: - VM-specific attachment logic using HCS APIs - Container integration support - Differencing disk operations - Advanced VHD metadata manipulation - Asynchronous operation support - Progress reporting for long-running operations

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.CreateVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVhdRequest)
member.summary: Creates a virtual hard disk with enhanced options including differencing disk support

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.AttachVirtualHardDisk(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Attaches a VHD to a VM using HCS APIs for VM-specific attachment

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.DetachVirtualHardDisk(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detaches a VHD from a VM using HCS APIs

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.ResizeVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.ResizeVhdRequest)
member.summary: Resizes a VHD with progress reporting support

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.CreateVirtualHardDiskAsync(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVhdRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Creates a virtual hard disk asynchronously with progress reporting

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.AttachVirtualHardDiskAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Attaches a VHD to a VM using HCS APIs with VM-specific logic

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.DetachVirtualHardDiskAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Detaches a VHD from a VM using HCS APIs

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.ResizeVirtualHardDiskAsync(HyperV.Contracts.Models.ResizeVhdRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Resizes a VHD asynchronously with progress reporting

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.CreateDifferencingDiskAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Creates a differencing VHD that references a parent VHD

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.MergeDifferencingDiskAsync(System.String,System.UInt32,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Merges a differencing disk with its parent

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetVhdMetadataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets comprehensive information about a VHD file

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.SetVhdMetadataAsync(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadataUpdate)
member.summary: Sets VHD metadata properties

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.CompactVhdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Compacts a VHD file to reduce its size

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetVhdStateAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the current state of a VHD file

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.ValidateVhdAsync(HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdValidationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates a VHD file

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.ConvertVhdAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress})
member.summary: Converts a VHD from one format to another

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.CreateVirtualFloppyDiskAsync(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a virtual floppy disk

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.AttachVirtualFloppyDiskAsync(HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdAttachRequest)
member.summary: Attaches a virtual floppy disk to a VM

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.DetachVirtualFloppyDiskAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detaches a virtual floppy disk from a VM

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetMountedStorageImagesAsync
member.summary: Gets list of mounted storage images

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.EnableChangeTrackingAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Enables change tracking for a VHD

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.DisableChangeTrackingAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Disables change tracking for a VHD

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetVirtualDiskChangesAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets virtual disk changes for incremental backup

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetVmStorageDevicesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets storage devices attached to a VM

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetVmStorageControllersAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets storage controllers for a VM

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.AddStorageDeviceToVmAsync(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest)
member.summary: Adds a storage device to a VM

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.RemoveStorageDeviceFromVmAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a storage device from a VM

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.ListStorageDevicesAsync
member.summary: Lists all fixed storage devices (local drives) with their details.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.EnhancedStorageService.GetSuitableVhdLocationsAsync(System.Int64)
member.summary: Browses filesystems to find suitable locations for VHDX storage. Returns drives with sufficient free space and suggested paths.

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService
member.summary: VM Service using Host Compute System (HCS) API for real Hyper-V integration.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.Create(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest)
member.summary: Creates a VM using HCS API with comprehensive configuration.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.CreateVmConfiguration(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest,System.String)
member.summary: Creates proper Hyper-V VM configuration for HCS based on NanaBox sample.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.StartVm(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Starts a VM using HCS API.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.GenerateMacAddress
member.summary: Generates a random MAC address for the VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.GetCurrentUserSid
member.summary: Gets the current user's SID for HCS access control.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.SafeCloseOperation(System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Safely closes an HCS operation handle, preventing access violations.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.SafeCloseComputeSystem(System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Safely closes an HCS compute system handle, preventing access violations.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.ListVms
member.summary: Lists all HCS VMs.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.IsVmPresent(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if an HCS VM exists by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.StartVm(System.String)
member.summary: Starts an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.StopVm(System.String)
member.summary: Stops an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.TerminateVm(System.String)
member.summary: Terminates an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.PauseVm(System.String)
member.summary: Pauses an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.ResumeVm(System.String)
member.summary: Resumes an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.GetVmProperties(System.String)
member.summary: Gets properties of an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.ModifyVm(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies an HCS VM by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.ListVmSnapshots(System.String)
member.summary: Lists snapshots for an HCS VM (not supported - returns empty list).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.CreateVmSnapshot(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot for an HCS VM (not supported).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.DeleteVmSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a snapshot for an HCS VM (not supported).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Hcs.Services.VmService.RevertVmToSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reverts an HCS VM to a snapshot (not supported).
